author: Sangharakshita
title: Contents of Kalyana Mitrata - Women-s Order Convention 1987
content:
Question and answer session on

Communication/kalyana mitrata in the Order
Women's Convention, Taraloka, July 1987
Contents
1Order members practising the speech precepts - 'Shabda'
5Fear of authority
7Taking the precepts seriously or not valuing ordination
10Bhante's definition of 'trust'
18Confidentiality within the Order
23Trying to eschew the power mode altogether
27Talking more about objective things rather than one's mental states
30"Being an Order members is no joke!"
31Positive changes in the women's wing of the Order
